oversightFindingsState.title: SECURITY DEFINER write_audit_entry callable without project membership check
oversightFindingsState.rationale: Live Security Advisor triage 2026-07-10: public.write_audit_entry(...) is SECURITY DEFINER with search_path=public, EXECUTE granted to authenticated (and anon via PUBLIC). Body only guards auth.uid() IS NOT NULL ГғЖ’ГҶвҖҷГғвҖ ГўвӮ¬в„ўГғЖ’ГўвӮ¬ЕЎГғвҖҡГӮВўГғЖ’ГҶвҖҷГғвҖҡГӮВўГғЖ’ГӮВўГғВўГўвӮ¬ЕЎГӮВ¬ГғвҖҰГӮВЎГғЖ’ГўвӮ¬ЕЎГғвҖҡГӮВ¬ГғЖ’ГҶвҖҷГғвҖҡГӮВўГғЖ’ГӮВўГғВўГўвҖҡВ¬Г…ВЎГғвҖҡГӮВ¬ГғЖ’ГўвӮ¬ЕЎГғвҖҡГӮВқ any signed-in user can insert audit_log rows for arbitrary project_id (audit forgery / data-integrity). Trigger wrappers audit_*_row are lower risk (trigger context). Not a Migration 015 regression; pre-existing from 003_sprint2_audit_and_writes.sql.

oversightFindingsTriage.title: Phase C versus Phase E dependency coherence requires explicit decision record
oversightFindingsTriage.rationale: Codebase review confirms exact DrawingRevision provenance is NOT guaranteed for knowledge/commercial template chain. Growth payloads (knowledgeTemplateReviewGrowthService, knowledgeTemplatePublicationGrowthService) carry templateRevisionId (Knowledge Library template version) not drawing revision IDs. linkedRevisionIds is optional call-time context for viewer chrome subscription only ГғЖ’ГҶвҖҷГғвҖ ГўвӮ¬в„ўГғЖ’ГўвӮ¬В ГғВўГўвҖҡВ¬ГўвҖһВўГғЖ’ГҶвҖҷГғВўГўвҖҡВ¬Г…ВЎГғЖ’ГўвӮ¬ЕЎГғвҖҡГӮВўГғЖ’ГҶвҖҷГғвҖ ГўвӮ¬в„ўГғЖ’ГўвӮ¬ЕЎГғвҖҡГӮВўГғЖ’ГҶвҖҷГғвҖҡГӮВўГғЖ’ГӮВўГғВўГўвҖҡВ¬Г…ВЎГғвҖҡГӮВ¬ГғЖ’ГўвӮ¬ВҰГғвҖҡГӮВЎГғЖ’ГҶвҖҷГғВўГўвҖҡВ¬Г…ВЎГғЖ’ГўвӮ¬ЕЎГғвҖҡГӮВ¬ГғЖ’ГҶвҖҷГғвҖ ГўвӮ¬в„ўГғЖ’ГўвӮ¬ЕЎГғвҖҡГӮВўГғЖ’ГҶвҖҷГғвҖҡГӮВўГғЖ’ГӮВўГғВўГўвӮ¬ЕЎГӮВ¬ГғвҖҰГӮВЎГғЖ’ГўвӮ¬ЕЎГғвҖҡГӮВ¬ГғЖ’ГҶвҖҷГғВўГўвҖҡВ¬Г…ВЎГғЖ’ГўвӮ¬ЕЎГғвҖҡГӮВқ not persisted in Memory audit payloads for template review/publication. LessonsLearnedCapture type has no sourceRevisionIds field. drawing_revision_superseded events exist (revisionDetectionService) but no knowledge invalidation/revalidation hook. Cross-ref timeline tracks revisionId but is not linked to knowledge template chain. VariationEvidenceLink supports entityType drawing_revision but knowledge pipeline does not consume it. securityInterrupts.title: SECURITY DEFINER write_audit_entry callable without project membership check
securityInterrupts.rationale: Live Security Advisor triage 2026-07-10: public.write_audit_entry(...) is SECURITY DEFINER with search_path=public, EXECUTE granted to authenticated (and anon via PUBLIC). Body only guards auth.uid() IS NOT NULL ГғЖ’ГҶвҖҷГғвҖ ГўвӮ¬в„ўГғЖ’ГўвӮ¬ЕЎГғвҖҡГӮВўГғЖ’ГҶвҖҷГғвҖҡГӮВўГғЖ’ГӮВўГғВўГўвӮ¬ЕЎГӮВ¬ГғвҖҰГӮВЎГғЖ’ГўвӮ¬ЕЎГғвҖҡГӮВ¬ГғЖ’ГҶвҖҷГғвҖҡГӮВўГғЖ’ГӮВўГғВўГўвҖҡВ¬Г…ВЎГғвҖҡГӮВ¬ГғЖ’ГўвӮ¬ЕЎГғвҖҡГӮВқ any signed-in user can insert audit_log rows for arbitrary project_id (audit forgery / data-integrity). Trigger wrappers audit_*_row are lower risk (trigger context). Not a Migration 015 regression; pre-existing from 003_sprint2_audit_and_writes.sql.
securityInterrupts.targetSprintOrMilestone: Immediate security remediation sprint (non-blocking for unrelated roadmap sprints)
objects: public.write_audit_entry(uuid, text, text, text, text, text, text)
securityInterrupts.remediation: Add is_project_member(p_project_id) guard (or restrict EXECUTE to service_role / revoke from authenticated/PUBLIC); keep search_path pinned.
